description: Confirm the project instructions match the actual stack
steps: Read SPEC.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, package.json, prisma/schema.prisma, and lib/db.ts
Confirm the app uses Next.js 16, React 19, Bun as package manager, Prisma 7, Neon PostgreSQL, better-auth, TipTap, and Playwright
Confirm no task or implementation path assumes SQLite or Bun SQLite
Record any instruction drift in agent-progress.txt before changing code

description: Verify Prisma and Neon PostgreSQL database setup
steps: Use prisma/schema.prisma as the database source of truth
Verify datasource provider is postgresql
Verify Prisma client output is lib/generated/prisma
Verify lib/db.ts uses PrismaNeon with DATABASE_URL
Run bun run db:generate
Run bun run build or document any missing environment blocker

description: Verify better-auth Prisma models and migration alignment
steps: Confirm User, Session, Account, and Verification models match better-auth requirements for the installed version
Confirm the initial Prisma migration creates the same auth tables used by better-auth
Use the docs-researcher agent before changing better-auth or Prisma adapter configuration
Run bun run db:migrate only when DATABASE_URL points at the intended development Neon branch
Run bun run build after any schema or auth model change

description: Verify Note model behavior for private notes and public sharing
steps: Confirm Note has id, title, content, userId, isPublic, shareToken, createdAt, and updatedAt
Confirm Note.userId has an index for per-user dashboard queries
Confirm shareToken is unique and nullable
Confirm public lookups require both shareToken and isPublic=true
Add or update tests if a behavior is missing

description: Verify authentication flow and route protection
steps: Confirm /auth supports sign up and sign in with email and password
Confirm /api/auth/[...all] exports the better-auth handler
Confirm protected app routes redirect unauthenticated users to /auth
Confirm sign out clears the session and redirects to /auth
Validate with Playwright or bunx playwright test

description: Audit server-side ownership checks for note operations
steps: Find every note read, create, update, delete, and share operation
Confirm private note operations use the authenticated session user id
Confirm users cannot read, edit, delete, or share notes they do not own
Confirm public shared note viewing is the only unauthenticated note path
Add regression coverage for any missing ownership check

description: Verify note creation, viewing, editing, and deletion
steps: Confirm /notes/new creates a note for the authenticated user
Confirm /notes/[id] renders owned notes and rejects missing or unauthorized notes
Confirm /notes/[id]/edit saves validated title and content changes
Confirm delete requires confirmation and redirects to /dashboard
Validate with Playwright or bunx playwright test
Confirm the editor stores submitted content in the Note.content field
Confirm toolbar support for bold, italic, underline, headings, bullet list, numbered list, links, blockquote, and horizontal rule
Confirm saved rich text renders correctly in read-only note views
Add Playwright coverage for any missing formatting control
Run bun run lint and the relevant Playwright tests

description: Verify public note sharing and revocation
steps: Confirm sharing can be enabled from an owned note
Confirm public URLs use /share/[shareToken]
Confirm anonymous visitors can view public notes read-only
Confirm disabling sharing prevents anonymous access
Confirm the copy URL action gives user feedback
Validate with Playwright or bunx playwright test

description: Implement dashboard search for the current user's notes
steps: Add a search input to the dashboard or a focused dashboard client component
Search only the authenticated user's notes
Match the query against title and content using Prisma with PostgreSQL-compatible filtering
Keep the default dashboard ordered by updatedAt descending
Add Playwright coverage for matching and non-matching queries

description: Make validation commands match package.json and the project setup
steps: Confirm package.json has scripts for dev, build, lint, db:generate, db:migrate, db:studio, and format
Add a test:e2e script for Playwright if useful
Do not add a test script unless unit tests are actually configured
Update project docs if command names change
Run bun run lint and bun run build after script changes
Confirm Playwright uses http://localhost:3030 consistently
Confirm global setup creates a unique test user and saved auth state
Ensure tests do not depend on hidden state from previous runs except the explicit /tmp state files
Cover auth, route protection, create, edit, delete, formatting, sharing, copying, and revocation
Run bunx playwright test or document any environment blocker

description: Polish responsive layout and accessible controls
steps: Check dashboard, auth, note view, note edit, new note, and shared note pages at desktop and mobile widths
Ensure buttons and links have clear accessible names
Ensure form fields have labels or accessible names
Fix any text overflow, cramped spacing, or dark-mode contrast issues
Validate important UI changes with Playwright screenshots or browser checks

description: Document local environment and validation workflow
steps: Confirm README or docs mention DATABASE_URL, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, and BETTER_AUTH_URL
Confirm docs say BETTER_AUTH_URL must match http://localhost:3030 during local testing
Document the difference between Bun as package manager and Node runtime for Next.js
Document the validation ladder used by Ralph
Do not include real secrets in documentation

description: Run the final project validation ladder
steps: Run bun run lint
Run bun run build
Run bunx playwright test with the development server and Neon development database available
Review git diff for unrelated changes
Update agent-progress.txt with final validation results
